footer.description: Nuvora provides powerful free online tools for everyone.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Nuvora

items.question: What is Nuvora?
items.answer: Nuvora is a free online tool platform providing browser-based utilities for network diagnostics, PDF processing, image editing, and more. All tools run in your browser — nothing leaves your device.

items.question: Are the tools really free?
items.answer: Yes. All Nuvora tools are completely free with no limits, no signup, and no hidden fees.

items.question: Is my data private?
items.answer: Absolutely. Every tool runs locally in your browser. Your files and data never leave your device. No servers, no uploads, no tracking.

items.question: How is Nuvora different?
items.answer: Nuvora combines powerful tools with AI-powered analysis, all while keeping your data completely private. No signup required.

items.question: Can I suggest a new tool?
items.answer: Yes! Use our Contact page to submit suggestions. We review every request.

newsletter.title: Get notified about new tools
newsletter.subtitle: New tools, features, and launches. No spam — unsubscribe anytime.
